Why We Are No.1

The Leader in Borewell Equipment Across India

Ganapathi Rock Tools is not just a supplier — we are Hyderabad's most trusted borewell equipment company. For over 20 years, borewell contractors across Telangana, Andhra Pradesh and India have relied on us for the highest quality DTH hammers, drill bits and borewell tools.

Our reputation as India's No.1 borewell supplier is built on one thing: delivering the best quality products at the best prices, every single time. When your rig is in the ground, you can't afford compromise — and neither can we.

India's Best Borewell Equipment Range

The highest quality DTH hammers, drill bits, drill rods, casing pipes and borewell accessories — all stocked in Hyderabad and ready for immediate supply across India.

01
DTH Equipment · Best Quality

DTH Hammers

India's best quality Down-the-Hole hammers for borewell drilling in hard rock. Fast penetration, long service life — trusted by contractors across Hyderabad and Telangana.

02
DTH Equipment · High Quality

DTH Drill Bits

Premium button bits and flat-face bits in all standard diameters. Tungsten carbide inserts for maximum wear life — the best quality bits available in Hyderabad.

Button BitsFlat Face4"–10" Range

03
Drill String · Premium Grade

Drill Rods & Pipes

Heavy-duty premium grade drill rods and drill pipes for borewell and water well drilling. Multiple lengths and diameters — best quality available across India.

Drill RodsDrill PipesExtension Rods
Enquire Now →
04
Casing · High Quality

Casing Pipes

Premium PVC and MS borewell casing pipes for structural lining and protection. All standard borewell diameters — best quality casing pipes in Hyderabad.

PVC CasingMS CasingAll Diameters
Enquire Now →
05
Accessories · Complete Range

Borewell Accessories

Complete range of borewell accessories — couplings, shank adaptors, centralizers, guide tubes and sub adapters. Best quality accessories for every borewell rig.

CouplingsShank AdaptorsGuide TubesCentralizers
Enquire Now →
06
Top Hammer · Premium Quality

Rock Drilling Tools

Premium threaded bits, taper bits, drifter rods and top hammer tools for surface and underground rock drilling. Best quality rock drilling tools across Hyderabad and India.

About Ganapathi Rock Tools

Hyderabad's No.1 Borewell Equipment Supplier

Ganapathi Rock Tools is the leading borewell equipment supplier in Hyderabad and Telangana. For over 20 years, we have been the first choice for borewell contractors across India — supplying the highest quality DTH hammers, drill bits, casing pipes and borewell accessories.

Our reputation as India's best borewell tools supplier is built on uncompromising quality, competitive pricing and reliable supply. Based in ECIL, Hyderabad, we understand the local hard rock conditions and what it takes to run a successful borewell operation.
